articles.title: Grok 4.3
articles.summary:
• grok-4.3은 xAI API에서 제공되는 모델이며, 모델 이름은 grok-4.3, 별칭은 grok-4.3-latest임

articles.title: Fincept Terminal - 금융 분석 플랫폼 오픈소스
articles.summary:
• Bloomberg Terminal($24,000/년), Refinitiv Eikon($20,000+/년)의 무료 대안을 목표로 하는 오픈소스 금융 분석 플랫폼으로, v4는 C++20 + Qt6 네이티브 앱으로 구축

articles.title: Spotify가 인간 아티스트와 AI를 구분하기 위해 ‘Verified’ 배지를 추가함
articles.summary:
• Spotify가 아티스트가 AI 생성 인격이 아니라 인간임을 식별할 수 있도록 ‘Verified by Spotify’ 배지를 도입함
  • 배지는 아티스트 이름 옆에 초록색 체크 아이콘과 ‘Verified by Spotify’ 문구로 표시되며, “진정성을 보여주는 정의된 기준”...

articles.title: AI는 대중이 생각하는 것보다 물을 적게 사용한다

articles.title: WhatCable - USB-C 케이블을 검사하는 작은 메뉴 막대 앱
articles.summary:
• Mac에 꽂힌 USB-C 케이블이 실제로 무엇을 할 수 있는지와 Mac 충전이 느릴 수 있는 이유를 쉬운 문장으로 보여주는 macOS 메뉴 막대 앱

articles.title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
articles.summary: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit

articles.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
articles.summary: The DTC skin, hair, and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

articles.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
articles.summary: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

articles.title: Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic
articles.summary: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

articles.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
articles.summary: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

articles.title: Good developers learn to program. Most courses teach a language
New research suggests people can communicate and practice skills while dreaming
